title: Huawei IdeaHub B3 86" - Interactive Whiteboard
description: IdeaHub B3 is a multiplatform all-in-one video conferencing solution that supports a wide range of features, including 1080p HD cloud meetings , Bring Your Own Meeting (BYOM) functionality, Wi-Fi 6 for direct projection, and 16 ms writing latency - serving as a versatile conferencing and display endpoint for todayâs modern office Transfer your video conference from your computer and enjoy immersive meetings with IdeaHub's cameras, microphones, and speakers Supports popular cloud meeting applications such as Webex, Zoom, etc Auto-Framing and distortion correction Sound capture up to 10 meters away Two-person conversation mode - displays two speakers on the screen simultaneously Speaker tracking + intelligent sound source localization keeps the speaker centered in the frame Writing on the digital screen has never been smoother, thanks to an advanced AI handwriting prediction algorithm Very low 16 ms writing latency Color and line thickness switching, and more during writing on the screen Image insertion Handwriting recognition The AI algorithm developed by Huawei ensures accurate and natural images No network available? Simply enable Wi-Fi on the IdeaHub device and your PC or mobile device, and the IdeaShare app will automatically initiate 4K projection using innovative direct Wi-Fi projection technology Huawei IdeaHub products feature the CC EAL5+ certification, the highest security certification for global commercial systems.
